description: Ticket lifecycle versions per incident. fixes_applied and issues_arised are dynamically derived from the incident's root_cause, fix, impacted_components, and the real dependency graph. Closed/Resolved incidents: 4-5 versions. Open/In-Progress: 1-2 versions.

versions.comment: Incident INC-1000 detected. Payment Authorization performance degradation reported. Symptoms: Latency Increase, Retry Storm. Ticket created.
issues_arised: internal-lb traffic temporarily dropped while auth-service routing rules were updated

versions.comment: Assigned to engineer-17@company.com. Investigation started. Root cause suspected: DB Index Regression. Impacted components: auth-service, postgres-cluster, api-gateway.
fixes_applied: Correlated alerts with metrics on auth-service to confirm root cause: DB Index Regression
Checked postgres-cluster for cascading impact; isolated from traffic if needed
Halted batch DB jobs on auth-service to reduce load during investigation
issues_arised: api-gateway experienced elevated error rate when auth-service was restarted during fix — monitoring elevated metrics on dependent

versions.comment: Root cause confirmed: DB Index Regression. Fix applied: Add database index. Awaiting validation.
fixes_applied: Added database index on auth-service to address regression
Added database index on postgres-cluster to address regression
Ran EXPLAIN ANALYZE on auth-service to verify new query plan in use
issues_arised: internal-lb traffic temporarily dropped while auth-service routing rules were updated during having indices rebuilt operation
api-gateway experienced elevated error rate when auth-service was restarted during fix during having indices rebuilt operation

versions.comment: Incident INC-1000 resolved. Payment Authorization restored. Synthetic monitoring confirms recovery. Duration: 101.3 minutes.
fixes_applied: Confirmed auth-service error rate returned to < 1% post-fix
Validated SLA metrics: latency and throughput within targets for auth-service
Verified postgres-cluster dependency health normalised
Closed rollback window — fix verified stable for 15 minutes
issues_arised: api-gateway experienced elevated error rate when auth-service was restarted during fix — transient; recovered within 5 minutes post-fix
internal-lb traffic temporarily dropped while auth-service routing rules were updated — transient; recovered within 5 minutes post-fix

versions.comment: Post-mortem completed. Root cause: DB Index Regression. Fix: Add database index. All action items tracked. Ticket closed.
fixes_applied: Added monitoring alert for recurrence of DB Index Regression on auth-service
Updated incident runbook with fix steps for DB Index Regression
Implemented dependency health check between auth-service and postgres-cluster
